Container.Name: wodGod
Container.Overview: wodGod is a stateful CrossFit programming engine for up to 10 athletes. It generates personalized workouts via an LLM, stores training history in PostgreSQL, and enforces programming rules and safety constraints.
Container.Description: wodGod - AI-powered CrossFit programming engine. Generates personalized workouts using LLM, tracks training history, and enforces programming rules. Requires an external PostgreSQL database and an Ollama (or OpenAI-compatible) LLM server.

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the wodGod web interface

Config.Name: Database URL
Config.Description: PostgreSQL connection string. Point this at your existing Postgres instance.

Config.Name: JWT Secret
Config.Description: Secret key for JWT token signing. Change this to a random string!

Config.Name: JWT Expiry (hours)
Config.Description: How many hours before login tokens expire.

Config.Name: LLM Base URL
Config.Description: URL of your Ollama or OpenAI-compatible LLM server.

Config.Name: LLM Model
Config.Description: Model name to use for workout generation (e.g. llama3, mistral, etc.)

Config.Name: LLM API Key
Config.Description: API key for OpenAI-compatible providers. Leave blank for Ollama.
